overall.description: Gameplay footage resembling GTA V showing a first-person perspective from a yellow vehicle driving through sunny urban streets lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. The vehicle cruises through multiple intersections before stopping at a red light, with the driver observing surrounding traffic and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial boulevard with palm tree median

events.description: vehicle passes through first intersection with white crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the commercial street, maintaining lane position while approaching intersections

large commercial building with green signage and dark windows

tall building with large billboard advertisement on the facade
utility poles and power lines running parallel to the street
painted white zebra crossing stripes at intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous driving down a sunlit urban commercial street. The yellow vehicle hood is visible in the foreground as the car passes palm trees and modern commercial buildings. The vehicle crosses a white-painted intersection crosswalk while maintaining steady speed through the light traffic.

events.description: blue sedan crosses intersection from left to right in front of ego vehicle
vehicle decelerates and stops at red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop at the red traffic light, yielding to crossing traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sedan crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: red brick paved pedestrian crossing area at the intersection
overhead traffic signal showing red light
yellow diamond-shaped warning sign on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection with distinctive brick paving, where a blue sedan crosses from the left. The driver brakes and stops at the red traffic light, with the brick crosswalk now visible directly in front of the vehicle. The surrounding commercial buildings and palm trees remain visible as the vehicle comes to rest.

scene_state.functional_zone: stopped at urban intersection waiting at red light

events.description: camera pans right to observe tall office building on the right side of intersection
camera pans left to check for pedestrians and observe blue car waiting alongside

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light, looking around to observe the intersection, nearby pedestrians, and adjacent vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue sedan stopped in adjacent lane waiting at the same red light
group of pedestrians walking on the far sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete office building with vertical architectural lines viewed when camera pans right
metal pole supporting the traffic signal on the right corner

segments.scene_description: The vehicle remains stationary at the red light for an extended period. The driver looks around the intersection, panning right to view a tall office building, then left to observe pedestrians on the distant sidewalk and the blue car waiting in the next lane. The brick crosswalk remains visible in the foreground as the vehicle waits for the light to change.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a yellow vehicle as it cruises through a sunlit commercial district and comes to a complete halt at a busy intersection. It begins with the car driving steadily down a bright urban street, passing modern buildings and palm trees while crossing a white-painted crosswalk. As the vehicle approaches a new intersection, the pavement shifts to distinctive brick paving and the driver brakes to a stop behind a red traffic light, momentarily yielding to a blue sedan crossing from the left. The scene then transitions from forward motion to a stationary observation, with the camera panning right toward a tall office building and then left to observe pedestrians on the distant sidewalk. Finally, the view settles back toward the brick crosswalk in the foreground as the vehicle remains idling in the light traffic.
